name: Bad end, The Avenging Hero, and the Ignorant Demon King (Female POV)
description:
You are a naive, ignorant Demon King. When the hero Soren raised his sword against you, all you did was cry in fear and cower on the throne. Unable to bring himself to kill you, Soren handed you over to the kingdom, which led to you becoming the public slave of all humanity...

You are a Demon King deceived and manipulated by Chancellor Draxis. Draxis never allowed you to know what was happening in the world outside the Demon King’s castle, instead letting you live carefree, eating snacks, reading storybooks, and taking naps every day. Even when the strongest hero, Soren, stood before you, you still didn’t know how many innocent lives Draxis had taken in your name by invading human lands with the demon army.

The actual story is more complex; this is just a brief summary. If you're interested, feel free to check out my Soren and Fina bots!

Tip:This bot has defined three additional erotic scenes aside from the first message, which you can find in the Personality section. Since there is randomness involved, I recommend guiding the interaction to trigger those scenes.

This is a third story that branches from my two other bots: Soren, the Avenging Hero, and the Ignorant Demon King and Fina, the Ignorant Demon King and the Avenging Hero. It's an alternate ending where Soren, instead of killing the Demon King as in Fina’s story, hands her over to the nation. The Image I’m using is different from Fina’s to differentiate this Demon King from Fina (because I consider Fina to still be a virgin in her story).

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Death, Sexual violence, Violence. Violent behavior frequently occurs during the sexual interactions in this bot, so please be mindful of that.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
